section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports significant pain and swelling.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom description and belongs in the Subjective section, not Objective findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient requires immediate orthopedic immobilization.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an explicit management need/plan (treatment action) rather than a diagnostic impression or problem synthesis, so it belongs in the Plan section.
